# iproute_l2tp_tunnel (Resource)

Manages an L2TP tunnel (ip l2tp add tunnel).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# L2TP tunnel over UDP
resource "iproute_l2tp_tunnel" "udp" {
  tunnel_id      = 1
  peer_tunnel_id = 1
  encap_type     = "udp"
  local          = "10.0.0.1"
  remote         = "10.0.0.2"
  local_port     = 5000
  remote_port    = 5000
}

# L2TP tunnel over IP
resource "iproute_l2tp_tunnel" "ip" {
  tunnel_id      = 2
  peer_tunnel_id = 2
  encap_type     = "ip"
  local          = "10.0.0.1"
  remote         = "10.0.0.2"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `encap_type` (String) Encapsulation type (udp or ip).
- `local` (String) Local IP address.
- `peer_tunnel_id` (Number) Peer tunnel ID.
- `remote` (String) Remote IP address.
- `tunnel_id` (Number) Tunnel ID.

### Optional

- `local_port` (Number) Local UDP port.
- `remote_port` (Number) Remote UDP port.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
